titleStmt.title: SII 22.87: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 87. (A.R. No. 87 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA—24th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of land after its reclamation for meeting the requirements of worship on the day of festival in the month of Puraṭṭādi in the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram in Vāṇagōppāḍi a division of Rājarājavaḷanāḍu, by one Aḻagiyaperumāḷ daughter of Puṇṇīyañjeydāḷ a dēvaraḍiyāḷ of the Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyār (Ekāmranātha) temple at Kāñchīpuram, who is called the aṇukki (mistress ?) of Aḻagiyāṉ Ākāraśūraṉ alias Rājagambhīra-Chēdiyarāyaṉ the Malaiyamān chief of Kiḷiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka
coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4vatu Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu
peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭi caṇpaiāṉa virarāce
ntirapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāntoṉṟicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉā
ṟku kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ Aḻakiyāṉ Ākāracūraṉāṉa Irācagampira
ccetiyarāyar Aṇukki [śrī] kāñcipurattu Uṭaiyār tiruvekampa
muṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiliṟ tevaraṭiyāḷ puṇṇiyañceytāḷ
makaḷ Aḻakiyaperumāḷḷeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkku tiruppuraṭṭā
tittirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa tirunāḷpaṭikku tirut
tiviṭṭa nilam vaṭapāṟkellai tirukkapāli
śvaramuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatānattuk
ku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai tiruccūlakalluk
ku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peṇṇai Āṟ
ṟukku vaṭakkum melkkuellai maṉaṉtūyanallūrkkā
l mukappukku kiḻakkum Ikkāllukku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam nañcai puñcai Akappaṭa
viṭṭeṉ caṉtirātittavarai celvatāka Itu māṟuvāṉ keṅkai Iṭai kumari
iṭai pāvaṅ koḷvāṉ Eḻānarakattil kiḻānarakam pukuvāṉ taṉmiṇāṭ
ṭiyai paṟaiyaṉṉukku kuṭuppāṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ḥ
Digital edition of SII 22.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
